rows.query: bedtime: dim the brightness to 5%, turn on do not disturb total silence, and turn off wifi
commands: bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py list system | grep -i bright
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py list system | grep -i screen
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py list secure | grep -i dnd
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py list system | grep -i wifi
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py list secure | grep -i wifi
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py list global | grep -i wifi
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py list secure | grep -i dnd
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py list system | grep -i dnd
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py list secure | grep -i ringer
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py list global | grep -i zen
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py list global | grep -i dnd
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py list system | grep -i ringer
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py list system | grep -i mode
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py get system ringer_mode
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py get global zen_mode
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py get system screen_brightness
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py get system screen_brightness_mode
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py put system screen_brightness 13
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py put global zen_mode 2
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py put global wifi_on 0

rows.query: battery saver mode: turn on low power, drop the brightness to 20%, and set the screen timeout to 15 seconds
commands: bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py list system | grep -i "power\|battery\|saver\|screen_timeout\|sleep\|brightness"
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py list secure | grep -i "power\|battery\|saver\|screen_timeout\|sleep\|brightness"
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py list global | grep -i "power\|battery\|saver\|screen_timeout\|sleep\|brightness"
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py list system | grep -i "brightness"
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py put global low_power 1
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py put system screen_brightness 51
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py put system screen_off_timeout 15000

rows.query: set up the phone for my grandmother: largest font, turn on high contrast text, and enable accessibility
commands: bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py list system 2>&1 | grep -iE "font|text|display"
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py list system 2>&1 | grep -iE "accessibility"
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py list secure 2>&1 | grep -iE "font|text|contrast|accessibility"
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py list global 2>&1 | grep -iE "font|text|contrast|accessibility"
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py get system font_scale
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py put system font_scale 1.5
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py put secure high_text_contrast_enabled 1
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py put secure accessibility_enabled 1
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py get system font_scale && python3 SET-2/settings.py get secure high_text_contrast_enabled && python3 SET-2/settings.py get secure accessibility_enabled

rows.query: gaming mode: max brightness, do not disturb total silence, and screen timeout to 10 minutes
commands: bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py list system | grep -i "brightness\|screen_on_timeout\|sleep"
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py list secure | grep -i "dnd\|do_not_disturb\|priority\|mode"
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py list secure | grep -i "dnd\|notification\|priority\|mode"
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py list global | grep -i "dnd\|do_not_disturb\|priority\|mode"
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py get system screen_brightness_mode
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py list system | grep -i "brightness"
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py list global | grep -i "zen\|dnd\|priority\|silence\|alarm"
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py get system ringer_mode
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py put system screen_brightness 255
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py put system screen_off_timeout 600000
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py put global zen_mode 1
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py get system screen_brightness && python3 SET-2/settings.py get system screen_off_timeout && python3 SET-2/settings.py get global zen_mode

rows.query: deep work focus: do not disturb important only, screen timeout to 30 minutes, and turn off heads-up notifications
commands: bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py list system | grep -iE "dnd|notification|timeout|sleep"
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py list secure | grep -iE "dnd|notification|timeout|sleep"
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py list global | grep -iE "dnd|notification|timeout|sleep"
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py get system screen_off_timeout
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py get global zen_mode
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py get global heads_up_notifications_enabled
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py put system screen_off_timeout 1800000
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py put global zen_mode 2
bash: python3 SET-2/settings.py put global heads_up_notifications_enabled 0
